{{CargoRelic
|name=Wednesday Star
|class_id=20393
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Fortune Law 4: Nothing is perfect, and you cannot have both spring flowers and autumn moon at the same time!
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail RUSH +1<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss2=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail RUSH +2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss3=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss4=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800
|ss7=Per 10 Lucky Star, Snail RUSH +3<br>Lucky Star Gained: 800/800<br> (Awakened)
}}
